problem.body1: Managing society finances shouldn't take hours every month. Between Excel sheets, WhatsApp reminders, and manual tracking - things get messy fast.
problem.body2: FlatLedger simplifies everything into one easy system.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Quick answers about your free trial, billing, and support.

items.a: Yes. You can enter your flat list and opening balances directly, or copy them from your existing Excel sheet. Most societies are set up and billing within 30 minutes.

items.q: Is FlatLedger easy for non-technical users?
items.a: Yes. FlatLedger is designed for treasurers and secretaries, not IT professionals. If you can use WhatsApp, you can use FlatLedger. No technical training needed.

items.q: Do you support UPI or online payments?
items.a: FlatLedger supports offline payment recording - you record cash, UPI, cheque, and bank transfer payments that residents make directly to the society account. It keeps things simple and fully under your committee's control.

items.q: How many flats can I manage?
items.a:
Starter: ₹199/month or ₹1,499/year - up to 50 flats

Growth: ₹299/month or ₹2,499/year - up to 100 flats

30 day free trial, no credit card required
Yes. FlatLedger uses encrypted data storage, role-based access control, and regular backups. Only your committee members can access your society's data. We do not share data with any third party.

items.q: What does the free trial include?
items.a: The 30-day free trial gives you full access to all features - billing, payments, expenses, reports, and user management. No credit card required. You only pay if you choose to continue after the trial.

items.q: Can we export our data anytime?
items.a: Yes. Bills, payment records, and reports can be exported to CSV at any time. Your data is always yours - you are never locked in.

items.q: What happens if we stop using FlatLedger?
items.a: You can export all your data - bills, payments, and reports - as CSV files at any time. There is no lock-in. If you cancel, your data remains accessible for 30 days for export.

finalCta.title: Ready to stop managing maintenance in Excel?
